name: @kirill.konshin/eslint-config-next-custom
description: TOMBSTONE of a retired package (merged into @kirill.konshin/lint). Must exist on disk: Nx Release attributes commits touching a DELETED project's package.json to ALL projects (project-glob-changes.js: 'If any project has been deleted, we must assume all projects were affected'), which mass-bumps the whole workspace. Keep until every package has a release tag newer than the last feat/fix that touched this package.
author: Kirill Konshin <kirill@konshin.org> (https://konshin.org)
